name: core--gitignore-newline-fix
description: protected/.gitignore has correct newlines between entries. Prior bug: 'echo >> .gitignore' without trailing newline caused .DS_Store and temp_provider_schema/ to concatenate on one line, making both patterns inactive.

changes: Fixed concatenation bug: .DS_Storetemp_provider_schema/ split into two lines
Each pattern now on its own line with proper newline terminator

checks: File contains '.DS_Store' on its own line
File contains 'temp_provider_schema/' on its own line
No line contains both '.DS_Store' and 'temp_provider_schema' concatenated
git check-ignore -v protected/.DS_Store would match (if file existed)
git check-ignore -v protected/temp_provider_schema/ would match (if dir existed)
